name: Product defects
description: A web-first assertion failed — the live site behaved differently than the journey expects (e.g. missing element, wrong basket contents).

name: Test / locator defects
description: The test itself broke outside an assertion — often a locator that no longer resolves after a markup change on the site.

name: Timeouts
description: An action or navigation exceeded its timeout — frequently transient noise from testing a live, uncontrolled production site rather than a real defect.

name: Flaky (passed on retry)
description: The test failed at least once but passed on retry — the run is green, but worth keeping an eye on for emerging instability.
